LanguageData.Cascadia_Seattle.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->北部企業大廈廢墟和被洪水淹沒的郊區
LanguageData.Cascadia_Vancouver.placeRules.rulesStrin: place_summary->前英克雷科學家收復的沿海城市廢墟
LanguageData.HHTools_Coloradum.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->科羅拉多河沿岸的軍團據點
LanguageData.HHTools_DayglowState.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->因反應爐熔毀而傷痕累累的沿海地區
LanguageData.HHTools_Dine.placeRules.rulesStrings.2: place_summary->橫跨峽谷土地復興的納瓦荷聯盟
LanguageData.HHTools_DogCityTwoSun.placeRules.rulesSt: place_summary->由馴獸師統治的野蠻軍團領地
LanguageData.HHTools_Flagstaff.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->Caesar’s seat of command and judgment
LanguageData.HHTools_HiddenValley.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->莫哈維沙漠的地下掩體綜合體
LanguageData.HHTools_Hopi.placeRules.rulesStrings.2: place_summary->保留戰前傳統的高原家園
LanguageData.HHTools_HubState.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->主要 NCR 貿易資本
LanguageData.HHTools_LostHills.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->鋼鐵兄弟會的創始地堡
LanguageData.HHTools_MojaveTerritory.placeRules.rules: place_summary->新維加斯周圍的戰略沙漠邊境
LanguageData.HHTools_NavarroTerritory.placeRules.rule: place_summary->前英克雷基地轉變為 NCR 前哨基地
LanguageData.HHTools_NewCanaan.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->摩門教聚落轉變為貿易和信仰中心
LanguageData.HHTools_NewVegas.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->莫哈維沙漠中的燈光與政治之城
LanguageData.HHTools_Phoenixia.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->根據軍團法重建的老鳳凰廢墟
LanguageData.HHTools_ReddingState.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->北部採礦殖民地轉變為國家
LanguageData.HHTools_ShiState.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->scientific enclave from San Francisco survivors
LanguageData.HHTools_Sonora.placeRules.rulesStrings.2: place_summary->軍團佔領下的乾旱邊境
LanguageData.HHTools_TheBigCircle.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->連接 NCR 和新里諾的主要商隊路線
LanguageData.HHTools_TheDivide.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->廢墟與風暴的破碎景觀
LanguageData.HHTools_TheGreatSaltLake.placeRules.rule: place_summary->古湖床周圍的鹽灘和遺址
LanguageData.HHTools_TheHighway80.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->由商隊工會和傭兵維護的舊州際公路
LanguageData.HHTools_TheJetRoad.placeRules.rulesStrin: place_summary->新里諾與埋骨場之間的販毒路線
LanguageData.HHTools_TheLittleLoop.placeRules.rulesSt: place_summary->NCR 城鎮之間的區域貿易線路
LanguageData.HHTools_TheLong15.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->重要的 NCR-Legion 公路走廊
LanguageData.HHTools_TwinMother.placeRules.rulesStrin: place_summary->被軍團改造的部落聖地
LanguageData.HHTools_VaultCityState.placeRules.rulesS: place_foeLeader->持不同政見的食屍鬼叛軍
LanguageData.HHTools_Zion.placeRules.rulesStrings.2: place_summary->鬱鬱蔥蔥的峽谷是倖存部落的家園
LanguageData.Texico_Chihuahua.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->塵土飛揚的交戰部落和襲擊者堡壘的山脈
LanguageData.Texico_RioGrande.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->貿易河流邊境、攻擊者和被遺忘的前哨
LanguageData.Texico_Sinaloa.placeRules.rulesStrings.2: place_summary->由化學領主和軍火走私者統治的南部荒地
LanguageData.Wasteland_CityRuins.placeRules.rulesStri: place_summary->倒塌的大都市，傾斜的摩天大樓被無人機和數位幽靈困擾
LanguageData.Wasteland_Desert.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->陽光照射下的熔融玻璃沙漠和掩埋的摩天大樓，拾荒者在那裡尋找文物
LanguageData.Wasteland_Forest.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->由鐵皮樹和生物發光真菌組成的變種森林，軍事廢墟上長滿了生物發光真菌
